MINI MINUTES:
The parties did not stated their appearances or left any business card.
Hearing held and tentative adopted. Cross-defendant and cross-complainant East Bay Municipal Utility District's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant King Security Services Inc. is ordered to serve further verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
